soap_issues.message: Required fact text missing or changed in assessment: clinical_event_text='The clinical_event field documents event type symptom flare event; event label Seasonal rhinitis symptoms documented; event summary: Seasonal sneezing, nasal congestion, and itchy eyes were documented and Cetirizine was started..'.

Required fact text missing or changed in assessment: clinical_event_text='The clinical_event field documents event type symptom improvement event; event label Rhinitis symptoms controlled; event summary: Follow-up documented improved rhinitis symptoms while Cetirizine continued..'.
